_comment: Business-user plugin variant for claude.ai chat / Cowork surfaces (professional services, product marketing, customer support). Chat surfaces skills/ plus TOP-LEVEL commands (verified 2026-07-07 against a live v1.1/1.2 install; nested command groups never appear, and disable-model-invocation does not hide an entry from the user picker). Excluded: dev/repo-bound skills (useless without a codebase), presales/SC-specific skills (wrong personas), the personal life-decision pack, commands/life, and the dev-session top-level commands. find/guide stay — they are the routers business users need. Catalog authority: docs/specs/business-jtbd-map.md (18-skill 1:1 map). Publish with: bash global/scripts/cc-mirror.sh --profile business <business-mirror-remote>.
pluginDescription: Business toolkit for client-facing teams — branded documents and presentations, communications, meeting workflows, and decision support
marketplaceDescription: Curated Command Center plugin for business users on chat surfaces
